revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Copying from [[Category:S that add a tracking category]] to [[Category:reimport]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: wrap 5 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23462003564|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23817035935|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24221752933|time triggered pipeline]]
1 revision imported: trying to do a last fix of these, they will be fixed and not bloat the site
